dashboard.label: Heart Health
dashboard.description: Vendor-neutral heart rate + cardiovascular (Wearables data model)
dashboard.definition:
{"title":"Heart Health","description":"Heart rate, resting HR, BPM distribution, and cardiovascular / vascular-age health","defaults":{"dataSources":{"ds.search":{"options":{"queryParameters":{"latest":"$global_time.latest$","earliest":"$global_time.earliest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"global":{"showProgressBar":true}}},"inputs":{"input_global_trp":{"type":"input.timerange","options":{"token":"global_time","defaultValue":"-7d@d,now"},"title":"Time Range"},"input_person":{"type":"input.dropdown","title":"Person (temp)","options":{"token":"person","defaultValue":"*","items":[{"label":"All people","value":"*"},{"label":"P001","value":"P001"},{"label":"P002","value":"P002"}]}}},"dataSources":{"ds_resting_hr":{"type":"ds.chain","name":"Resting HR — latest","options":{"extend":"ds_hr_base","query":"| stats min(bpm) as resting_hr | table resting_hr"}},"ds_hr_stats":{"type":"ds.chain","name":"HR stats — latest (time-weighted avg, min/max)","options":{"extend":"ds_hr_base","query":"| sort 0 _time | streamstats current=f last(_time) as prev | eval w=case(isnull(prev),300,_time-prev<=0,300,_time-prev>900,900,true(),_time-prev) | eval wx=bpm*w | stats sum(wx) as sx sum(w) as sw max(bpm) as max_hr min(bpm) as min_hr | eval avg_hr=round(sx/sw,0) | table avg_hr, max_hr, min_hr"}},"ds_intraday":{"type":"ds.chain","name":"Intraday HR","options":{"extend":"ds_hr_base","query":"| sort _time | table _time, bpm"}},"ds_resting_trend":{"type":"ds.chain","name":"Resting HR trend","options":{"extend":"ds_hr_base","query":"| eval day=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d") | stats min(bpm) as "Resting HR" by day | sort day"}},"ds_distribution":{"type":"ds.chain","name":"BPM distribution","options":{"extend":"ds_hr_base","query":"| eval bpm_bucket=tostring(floor(bpm/10)*10)."-".tostring(floor(bpm/10)*10+9) | stats count by bpm_bucket | sort bpm_bucket"}},"ds_zone_inputs":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables person_id="$person$" (tag=wearable_heartrate OR (tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=person_info)) | eval agev=if(wearable_dataset="person_info",age,null()) | eventstats max(agev) as age | where bpm<=200 | eval day=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d") | stats min(bpm) as dmin, max(age) as age by day | stats median(dmin) as resting_hr, max(age) as age | eval resting_hr=round(resting_hr,0), max_hr=round(208-0.7*age,0), hrr=max_hr-resting_hr | table age, resting_hr, max_hr, hrr","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Karvonen inputs (age/RHR/maxHR/HRR)"},"ds_cardio_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables person_id="$person$" tag=wearable_daily (wearable_dataset=cardio_age OR wearable_dataset=person_info) | eval age_val=if(wearable_dataset="person_info",age,null()) | eventstats max(age_val) as actual_age | where wearable_dataset="cardio_age" | dedup day | sort -_time | head 1 | eval vascular_age=cardio_age, pwv=round(pwv,1), delta=cardio_age-actual_age, agecolor=case(delta<0,"#4CAF50",delta>0,"#E8503A",true(),"#F5A623") | table vascular_age, pwv, actual_age, delta, agecolor","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-45d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Cardiovascular age — latest"},"ds_cardio_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables person_id="$person$" tag=wearable_daily (wearable_dataset=cardio_age OR wearable_dataset=person_info) | eval age_val=if(wearable_dataset="person_info",age,null()) | eventstats max(age_val) as actual_age | where wearable_dataset="cardio_age" | dedup day | timechart span=1d@d latest(cardio_age) as "Vascular Age", latest(actual_age) as "Your Age"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Vascular age trend"},"ds_hr_base":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Heart rate — shared base","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_heartrate person_id="$person$" | dedup timestamp | where bpm<=200 | fields _time bpm"}}},"visualizations":{"resting_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resting_hr"},"options":{"majorField":"resting_hr","majorColor":"#4CAF50","majorFontSize":72,"label":"Resting HR","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('resting_hr')","align":"left"},"title":"Resting Heart Rate"},"avg_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hr_stats"},"options":{"majorField":"avg_hr","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Avg BPM","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('avg_hr')","align":"left"},"title":"Average BPM"},"min_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hr_stats"},"options":{"majorField":"min_hr","majorColor":"#4CAF50","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Min BPM","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('min_hr')","align":"left"},"title":"Minimum BPM"},"max_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hr_stats"},"options":{"majorField":"max_hr","majorColor":"#F4A422","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Max BPM","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('max_hr')","align":"left"},"title":"Maximum BPM"},"intraday_line":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"Intraday Heart Rate","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_intraday"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4E9EAF"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","lineWidth":1.5,"showDots":false,"yAxisTitle":"BPM","xAxisTitle":"Time"}},"resting_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"Resting HR Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resting_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"day","seriesColors":["#4E9EAF"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisTitle":"Resting BPM","xAxisTitle":"Date"}},"distribution_bar":{"type":"splunk.column","title":"BPM Distribution","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_distribution"},"options":{"xAxisField":"bpm_bucket","seriesColors":["#4E9EAF"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","yAxisTitle":"Sample Count","xAxisTitle":"BPM Range"}},"age_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_zone_inputs"},"options":{"majorField":"age","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Age","showLabel":false,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('age')","unit":" yrs","unitPosition":"after","align":"left"},"title":"Age"},"max_hr_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_zone_inputs"},"options":{"majorField":"max_hr","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Max HR (220 - age)","showLabel":false,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('max_hr')","align":"left"},"title":"Max HR (Tanaka)"},"hrr_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_zone_inputs"},"options":{"majorField":"hrr","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Heart Rate Reserve","showLabel":false,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('hrr')","align":"left"},"title":"HR Reserve"},"cardio_va_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_cardio_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"vascular_age","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Vascular Age","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('vascular_age')","unit":" yrs","unitPosition":"after","majorColor":"> primary | seriesByName('agecolor') | lastPoint()","align":"left"},"title":"Vascular Age"},"cardio_delta_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_cardio_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"delta","majorFontSize":42,"label":"vs Actual Age","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('delta')","unit":" yrs","unitPosition":"after","majorColor":"> primary | seriesByName('agecolor') | lastPoint()","align":"left"},"title":"Vascular vs Actual Age"},"cardio_pwv_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_cardio_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"pwv","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Pulse Wave Velocity","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('pwv')","unit":" m/s","unitPosition":"after","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","align":"left"},"title":"Pulse Wave Velocity"},"cardio_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_cardio_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4263B8","#F5A623"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisTitle":"Age (yrs)"},"title":"Vascular Age Trend (vs Your Age)"},"cardio_guide":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"### About these metrics
- **Vascular Age** — Oura's estimate of your arterial age from overnight pulse-wave data; *lower than your real age is good*.
- **Vascular vs Actual Age** — the gap between them (negative = your arteries look younger).
- **Pulse Wave Velocity (m/s)** — speed of your pulse through your arteries; *lower = healthier (more elastic)*. It rises with age (~7 m/s is typical in your 60s), so judge it via **Vascular Age** (which blends PWV with your age) rather than the raw number.
- **Max HR (Tanaka)** — estimated maximum heart rate = 208 − 0.7 × age (more accurate for older adults than 220 − age).
- **HR Reserve** — Max HR − Resting HR; the working range your training zones are built on.

**Learn more:** [Oura — Cardiovascular Age](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/28451491040019-Cardiovascular-Age)","backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)"}}},"layout":{"options":{},"globalInputs":["input_global_trp","input_person"],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_1","label":"Heart Rate"},{"layoutId":"layout_2","label":"Cardiovascular"}]},"layoutDefinitions":{"layout_1":{"type":"absolute","structure":[{"item":"resting_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":280,"h":200}},{"item":"avg_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":320,"y":20,"w":215,"h":200}},{"item":"min_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":555,"y":20,"w":215,"h":200}},{"item":"max_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":790,"y":20,"w":215,"h":200}},{"item":"intraday_line","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":240,"w":1400,"h":280}},{"item":"resting_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":540,"w":680,"h":280}},{"item":"distribution_bar","type":"block","position":{"x":740,"y":540,"w":680,"h":280}}],"options":{"width":1440,"height":830,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/oura_health/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}}},"layout_2":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1440,"height":730,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/oura_health/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}},"structure":[{"item":"age_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":220,"h":170}},{"item":"max_hr_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":710,"y":20,"w":220,"h":170}},{"item":"hrr_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":940,"y":20,"w":220,"h":170}},{"item":"cardio_va_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":250,"y":20,"w":220,"h":170}},{"item":"cardio_delta_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":480,"y":20,"w":220,"h":170}},{"item":"cardio_pwv_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":1170,"y":20,"w":250,"h":170}},{"item":"cardio_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":210,"w":1400,"h":280}},{"item":"cardio_guide","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":510,"w":1400,"h":210}}]}}}}
